'''Alimet''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Flight Officer befriended by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Biography==
Alimet was a member of a close-knit group of friends along with fellow [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] [[Carith]], known as "Grommet" to his friends, and [[Ketcher]]. The three usually served on tours of duty together. During a tour of duty aboard the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]'', the group met a new recruit named [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], who would later go on to become a legendary pilot and one of the Empire's most infamous figures. Alimet took an instant liking to Maarek and the four pilots would often spend their off-duty hours together. The four would later be reunited during a tour of duty under [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]] aboard the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Ludwick]]''. Some time between the tour of duty aboard the ''Fogger'' and the tour of duty aboard the ''Ludwick'', Alimet lost a ship during combat, but was able to eject in time and escape serious harm.

Alimet's third and final meeting with Stele would be on a notably more sober note. During the development of the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] prototype, Alimet and Stele were reunited during a tour of duty under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. There, Alimet revealed that Ketcher had passed away and Grommet had defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]].

==Personality and traits==
Alimet was just as tall as Maarek Stele, he had dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and shaggy eyebrows and eyes that constantly blinked and shifted.
